trans-d_mn_523: Your eyes are so beautiful, I can't look at you.
trans-d_mn_265: Do you want to go to the bar or work overtime?
trans-d_mn_41: Is the weather in the city where you are going to work as good as the weather in Ulaanbaatar?
trans-d_mn_430: You are so lazy! Don't you want to go out and play today?
trans-d_mn_394: Is this a new car? It looks like a new car from the car dealership, is it really?
